name: Orange Chicken from Loren Martin
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken to help prevent shrinkage.
2. Dip each breast in egg white, then coat evenly with breadcrumbs.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Sauté each breaded breast until golden brown.
5. Clean the skillet and combine orange juice, marmalade, lemon juice, lemon zest, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic.
6. Cook over medium heat, stirring until smooth.
7. Add chicken to the skillet, cover, and cook for 10 minutes or until tender.
Nutrients per serving: calories 397, protein 30g, carbohydrates 45g, total fat 10g (saturated fat 2g), dietary fiber 0, cholesterol 73mg, sodium 173mg.
